scripts.build:manual: node -e "var fs=require('fs');var p=require('path');function copy(src,dst){var d='dist/'+dst;try{fs.mkdirSync(p.dirname(d),{recursive:true})}catch(e){};fs.copyFileSync(src,d)};['manual.html','user_manual.typ','styles/styles.css','js/script.js','assets/images/LaTeXSnipper.png','assets/images/icon.png','assets/images/mathcraft_abstract_algebra.png','assets/images/mathcraft_chinese_lecture.png','assets/images/mathcraft_dynamics_journal.png','assets/images/mathcraft_limits_series.png'].forEach(function(f){copy(f,f)});copy('wasm/typst_ts_web_compiler_bg.wasm','wasm/typst_ts_web_compiler_bg.wasm');copy('wasm/typst_ts_renderer_bg.wasm','wasm/typst_ts_renderer_bg.wasm');copy('fonts/NotoSerifCJKsc-Regular.otf','fonts/NotoSerifCJKsc-Regular.otf');copy('js/all-in-one-lite.bundle.js','js/all-in-one-lite.bundle.js');console.log('Manual + WASM + fonts + JS bundle copied to dist/')"
